title: tragopogon ketzkhovelii
intro: Tragopogon ketzkhovelii, also known as Ketzkhovelii's goat's beard, is a perennial plant in the sunflower family that is native to the Caucasus region. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids. The health benefits of Tragopogon ketzkhovelii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
